title: If you need to reach me…
content:
If you need to reach me…

...you can text me @ 561.602.9880.

I do not respond at night or on weekends.

Also, if you text and I don't answer within 24 hours (outside of weekends), please don't hesitate to remind me of your question! =)

Professor Padavano

—

Academic Integrity and Use of Generative AI

Dear Students,

As we embark on this semester together, I want to emphasize the importance of academic integrity in our course. Maintaining honesty and originality in your work is crucial not only for your academic success but also for your personal and professional development.

Policy on Generative AI and Plagiarism:

1. Generative AI: The use of generative AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, DALL-E, etc.) to complete assignments, projects, or any other coursework is strictly prohibited. These tools can produce content that may seem original but is not your own work.

2. Plagiarism: Any form of plagiarism, including copying from other sources without proper citation or presenting someone else's work as your own, is against our academic policies.
context: From document: If you need to reach me… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/7)
